case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,A MUNICIPAL CORP vs. REYNOLDS, ADAM

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,A MUNICIPAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOLDS, ADAM
